{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212919FF694A2EBF40B02BA36C"}"},"total":3405},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7284149719310877440","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"消磨时间而已，也还流畅，人物描写细腻可看；书中别字、同音字现象存在，应予纠正。内容也与时俱进，切合当下实际与实话实说，可见作者也是蛮费一番心血，辛苦了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695974934,"group_id":"7130541832936623144","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+bIPlYaWcMg90wxyQd8XJdUFOKomFpgZDUVQfNJRpY/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1515546224898487","user_name":"团山子岛的金轮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1515546224898487","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7130541832936623144","book_info":{"abstract":"《无敌贾二虎》原著：24 年前被弃的婴儿，在底层摸爬滚打顽强长大。
如今王者归来，他带着滔天怒火踏入曾经抛弃他的世界。
面对仇人，他手段狠辣，神挡杀神，魔挡除魔。
大佬们纷纷求饶，仇人闻风丧胆。
最终，他站在权力巅峰，成为一代枭雄！
